creator: ohartman@mail.uni-mainz.de
text:
NumLock, CapsLock and ScrollLock does not work anymore on box with FreeBSD
6.1-STABLE/AMD64. All these LEDs do not work neither in X11 (Xorg, latest
port version) nor console. On i386 box (FreeBSD 6.1-STABLE/i386) at lab all
these keys work properly as expected. Sounds like and AMD64 issue.

Fix: 

Not known.
How-To-Repeat: Take most recent FreeBSD 6.1-STABLE/AMD64, enable kbdmux in kernel.
